en: hello dear friends how are you all this is Jyoti aka Cool Joe and you're
watching Jyotiology. So friends today we will be talking about some fun English
facts. So let's get started. The first English fact is it originated from West
Germany and Netherlands. English is the official language of almost 67 countries
and it is the most spoken international language. The shortest English sentence
that is grammatically correct is go. Go means to go. Did you know that the word
goodbye originated originally from the sentence God be with you. Lastly almost
11% of the English term we use is E. Friends that was all for today see you in my
next video till then stay safe take care bye bye
